name: emux
description: Eidos mux: TUI picker and MCP server for named tmux sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Control named tmux sessions from agents.
interface.longDescription: Emux gives Codex and Claude Code a shared registry for existing tmux sessions plus MCP tools to list sessions, register friendly names, send keys, capture panes, and run command-plus-capture loops. It never spawns or kills tmux sessions; it only observes and drives sessions the user already owns.
defaultPrompt: Use Emux to list my tmux sessions.
Register this Claude Code tmux session with Emux.
Capture the latest output from a named tmux session.
